articles.author: Catherine Ho
articles.title: Your ‘normal’ cholesterol and blood pressure may not be normal anymore - San Francisco Chronicle
articles.description: New guidelines suggest many Americans should aim lower — and start managing heart health earlier than before.
articles.content:
New guidelines encourage Americans to aim for lower blood pressure and cholesterol readings and start monitoring earlier to reduce heart disease risk.
Oscar Wong/Getty Images
